fundamentals.name: Arista Networks, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Arista Networks, Inc. engages in the development, marketing, and sale of data-driven, client to cloud networking solutions for AI, data center, campus, and routing environments in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia-Pacific. Its cloud networking solutions consist of Extensible Operating System (EOS), a publish-subscribe state-sharing networking operating system offered in combination with a set of network applications. The company offers data center, cloud and AI networking, cognitive adjacencies, and cognitive network software and services. It also provides post contract customer support services, such as technical support, hardware repair and replacement parts beyond standard warranty, bug fixes, patches, and upgrade services. The company serves a range of industries comprising internet companies, cloud service providers, financial services organizations, government agencies, media and entertainment, healthcare, oil and gas, education, manufacturing, industrial, and others. It markets and sells its products through distributors, system integrators, value-added resellers, and original equipment manufacturer partners, as well as through its direct sales force. Arista Networks, Inc. was formerly known as Arastra, Inc. and changed its name to Arista Networks, Inc. in October 2008. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, California.

judgment.summary: Arista Networks exhibits robust growth, exceptional profitability, and a pristine balance sheet, trading at a premium valuation that is justified by its performance.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 7.7%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 35.1% YoY and earnings growth 25.0% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin 42.7% and profit margin 38.3% demonstrate industry-leading profitability.
Return on equity 31.5% and return on assets 14.4% show efficient use of capital.
Zero total debt and $12.35B in cash provide significant financial flexibility.
Strong buy consensus from 27 analysts with a mean target price of $188.20 suggests positive external sentiment.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 52.93 and Forward P/E of 34.62 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio of 1.98 suggests that the stock may be trading above its expected growth rate.
Beta of 1.67 implies higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: Arista Networks (ANET) is highlighted as a trending stock, with recent articles discussing the broader AI infrastructure landscape and which companies are poised to benefit. While some pieces compare it to peers like Bandwidth (BAND) and Nvidia, others suggest ANET is the overlooked AI stock that matters. The company recently beat Q1 estimates, and the next earnings date is August 4th, with analysts maintaining a strong buy consensus and a mean target of $188.20.
